divergence: Electricity was declared a controlled substance and is sold by apothecaries
story_angle: solemn obituary for a beloved institution nobody can remember the purpose of
headline: Dustspire Enclave Honors Blame While Famine Forgets to Read the Ledger
deck: In a twist, posthumous honors lead to yesterday's missing volts being reclassified as 'heroic contributions.'
article:
The Dustspire Enclave has awarded the Ledger of Blame its highest commendation after the electromagnetic famine killed twenty-three gasbags. Ess-9-Vahl's final entry, dated 07-06-2263 and pressed under 14.7 kPa of dust, now stands as proof of endurance instead of a record of failure.

Ess-9-Vahl, fresh from a molt scored at 0.00 compliance, declared the dead gasbags had met their quotas and that blame itself was merely temporary. The Enclave promptly logged the blackout as spiritual enrichment.

Apothecary Bog-3v-Nul noted the strangeness of celebrating the lost while misplacing the electricity they needed. Gasbags continue molting while the shortage is filed away under new headings.
author: Lethar B. Etherwing, Chief Chronicler of Impermanent Events

weather.condition: Apothecaries forecast a shocking drought of volts after Dustspire's heroic reclassification

oped.title: Heroic Volts and Hat-Based Famine: Why We Must Regulate Millinery Immediately
oped.author: Professor Thaddeus Quibble, Certified Apothecary Ledger Auditor and Three-Time Winner of the Dustspire Hat-Off
oped.body: Reclassifying missing volts as heroic proves famine is simply bad arithmetic under oversized brims. Those wide hats clearly blocked both sight and sense. Electricity belongs behind counters, not scattered on unrecorded whims. Confiscate every hat and issue my volt-goggles instead; the surcharge will cover the month's lost prescriptions.

classifieds.text: Wastelander offloading three cracked volt-vials and a siphon rig after Dustspire rebranded yesterday's theft as heroic; apothecary stamps included, first can of water takes all.
Dustspire famine office needs a quick quill to log missing volts as Blame's posthumous gift before the ledger audit; pay in blackout rations, no volt questions.
To the enclave whose amps vanished last night: they have been honorably reclassified per page one, so cease your complaints or join the honored dead.
Notice to Blame's unnamed heirs: present proof of lineage at the apothecary by dusk or your heroic volts default to controlled-substance stock and famine fines.

panels.caption: "Blame siphoned the whole reserve before he croaked," the enclave herald announces. "Posthumous Hero of the Famine."
The famine clerk flips the ledger. "No entry. We'll call the theft a contribution."
"Then why's the grid still dark?" a starving citizen asks. "The volts died braver than we did."

joke.setup: Dustspire's apothecary council pinned a tin star on Blame for 'managing' the famine rations
joke.punchline: then discovered Famine had already traded the enclave's last three volts for a blank page he swore was the ledger.
joke.text: Dustspire's apothecary council pinned a tin star on Blame for 'managing' the famine rations. Then discovered Famine had already traded the enclave's last three volts for a blank page he swore was the ledger.

sponsor_ads.headline: Blame Ampoules, Apothecary Grade
sponsor_ads.body: One controlled jolt lets Dustspire citizens honor blame without ever consulting the ledger, even as famine counts the missing watts.
sponsor_ads.tagline: Prescribed only after the famine has already signed.

sponsor_ads.headline: Ledger-Erase Patches
sponsor_ads.body: Sticky electric plasters dissolve memory of famine tallies so the enclave can focus on honoring blame in peace.

sponsor_ads.headline: Dustspire Blame Ceremony Kits
sponsor_ads.body: Each kit contains two drams of licensed electricity and a lead plaque pre-engraved with 'we honor blame' while the ledger gathers dust.

sponsor_ads.headline: Public Notice: Electricity for Official Forgetting
sponsor_ads.body: Apothecaries remind all residents that controlled current is now required to properly ignore famine figures during blame-honoring rites.

stories.headline: Apothecary Cartels Adjust Volt Ledgers Following Dustspire Reclassification
stories.deck: Heroic volts now exempt from standard famine tariffs, boosting guild reserves by 14 pouches per cycle.
stories.article:
The Controlled Substance Exchange in Drift-4-Vault revised its tariffs after Dustspire declared the missing volts heroic. Apothecaries must now separate those units and pay an added three pressure-wave tokens per pouch in handling.

Compliant members gain fourteen pouches per cycle; others risk seizure of remaining stock by Enclave auditors.

stories.headline: Reef-Arcology Farmers Report Diminished Bioluminescence After Last Season's Pouch Shortage
stories.deck: Atmospheric condensation yields drop when gasbag laborers prioritize personality molts over volt application.
stories.article: Lower Cobalt Spiral reefs produced twenty-three fewer lumens per cubic meter this cycle. Workers whose molts occurred during planting halted until new layers set, leaving plots uncharged. Emergency allotments now require documented heroic contributions from the famine period.

stories.headline: Temple of the Annual Molt Declares Volt Withholding a Form of Spiritual Austerity
stories.deck: Posthumous Blame honors now count toward next-layer redemption tallies for the faithful.
stories.article: Temple priests equate volt rationing with the discipline of a proper molt. Withheld units may be recorded as offerings to pressure-wave ancestors. Petitioners who lost power during the famine can claim retroactive sanctity if their absence appears in the heroic ledger.

real_world_echo: Marine Le Pen found guilty but cleared for run if she wears tag — mirrored as the institution condemned for the 23 deaths yet granted a posthumous honor-tag by the Enclave
